chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 77 OF 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Bail Application 03.04.2023: Mr. Attaullah Abbasi Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Advocate for the Complainant Ms. Robina Qadir, Addl. P.G. ---- The applicant is not present in Court, his counsel pleads complete ignorance as to why he is absent today, however, learned counsel for the Complainant has placed on record a copy of FIR No.214/2023 registered at Police Station Gulistan-e-Jauhar and submits that the Applicant has been arrested in that FIR. In view of the foregoing, this bail application for pre arrest has become infructuous and is dismissed as such. J U D G E Amjad PS
